name: twinzy
description: Celebrity lookalike search with rich profile similarity

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @twinzy/frontend build && cd backend && mvn -q package -DskipTests
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d postgres backend frontend
scripts.docker:tag: sh -c 'test -n "$DOCKERHUB_USER" || (echo "Set DOCKERHUB_USER first" && exit 1); docker tag twinzy-backend ${DOCKERHUB_USER}/twinzy-backend:latest && docker tag twinzy-frontend ${DOCKERHUB_USER}/twinzy-frontend:latest'
scripts.docker:push: sh -c 'test -n "$DOCKERHUB_USER" || (echo "Set DOCKERHUB_USER first" && exit 1); docker push ${DOCKERHUB_USER}/twinzy-backend:latest && docker push ${DOCKERHUB_USER}/twinzy-frontend:latest'
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm db:up && sleep 4 && pnpm seed:small
